name: T-Rex Ranch
overview: Come along on the ultimate play date with Aaron and LB and all the other rangers at T-Rex Ranch, looking after all the different dinosaurs in the park.

trailers.title: Jurassic World Fallen Kingdom Dinosaur Surprise Toys with Chris Pratt, Bryce Dallas Howard & T-Rex
The Place I Want To Be Song! Dinosaurs at T-Rex Ranch! Giant T-Rex & More Dinosaurs! Songs For Kids!
